item.title: Prefiled for introduction.
item.description: Prefiled for introduction.

item.title: First reading, referred to Local Government.
item.description: First reading, referred to Local Government.

item.title: 👍Harold Stewart - City Manager at the City of Pasco
item.description: Harold Stewart signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent City Manager at the City of Pasco.

item.title: 👍💵Steven Ellis - Association of Washington Cities
item.description: Steven Ellis signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Association of Washington Cities. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: ❓💵Brad Tower - Washington Counties Risk Pool
item.description: Brad Tower signed up to testify Other. They are signed up to represent Washington Counties Risk Pool. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: ❓💵Axel Swanson - Washington State Association of Counties
item.description: Axel Swanson signed up to testify Other. They are signed up to represent Washington State Association of Counties. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: And refer to Transportation.
item.description: And refer to Transportation.

item.title: Referred to Transportation.
item.description: Referred to Transportation.

item.title: 👍Maria Serra - Public Works Director at the City of Pasco
item.description: Maria Serra signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Public Works Director at the City of Pasco.

item.title: 👍💵Brad Tower - Washington Counties Risk Pool
item.description: Brad Tower signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Washington Counties Risk Pool. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👎Stephen Alldridge - Washington Counties Risk Pool
item.description: Stephen Alldridge signed up to testify Con.

item.title: Minority; without recommendation.
item.description: Minority; without recommendation.
